steps.title: Find the y-intercept
steps.content:
The y-intercept occurs where $x = 0$. Substitute into the equation:
$$y = 500(2)^{2(0)} = 500(2)^0 = 500 \cdot 1 = 500$$
So the y-intercept is the point $(0, 500)$, meaning 500 subscribers when $x = 0$.

steps.title: Interpret the starting time
steps.content: The problem states the equation models subscribers starting from the end of January 1997. This means $x = 0$ corresponds to the end of January 1997. At that time, there were 500 subscribers. B is correct.
